source_document: Risk Acceptability Criteria Table — derived from ISO 14971 occurrence categories

rules.obligation: Map raw complaint rates to RACT occurrence codes: O1 Improbable (≤0.0001), O2 Remote (≤0.001), O3 Occasional (≤0.01), O4 Probable (≤0.10), O5 Frequent (≤1.0). Compare actual against max expected per hazard.
rules.agent_instruction: Use the pre-computed RACT comparison from statistics. Do NOT recompute the occurrence band — the deterministic mapping is the source of truth.

rules.obligation: When actual rate exceeds the max expected rate for a hazard, trigger CAPA assessment and document outcome.
rules.agent_instruction: If statistics.ract_breaches is non-empty, Section F must call out each breach, Section I must document the CAPA response, and Section M must reference both.
